title: DZphoenix
description: "Unleash DZphoenix, the Legendary Netherite Sword" with "Eternal Forge," a Minecraft datapack. Crafted from Nether Stars and Blaze Rods, this mythical weapon awaits a hero's right-click to unleash its formidable powers.
body:
##  "Unleash DZphoenix the Legendary Netherite Sword"
is a Minecraft datapack titled "Eternal Forge." It introduces a mythical weapon crafted through a lightning-infused ritual involving Nether Stars and Blaze Rods. This powerful sword appears stuck in the ground, awaiting a hero's claim. With a simple right-click, players can release its formidable powers and wield its legendary might,
**this is the legend's says**

###   the DZphoenix sword
is a netherite sword which has 10 enchantements lvl of every sword enchant, you may think that this is op but the trick is in the crafting cuz it requires **2 nether stars+1 blaze rod**
### how to get
getting it by simply throwing 2 nether stars and a blaze rod in the same block

you'll notice that a lighning bolt has struck, wait 5 secs and you will find the sword in the ground,to get it simply right click it
